scene_description:
**Foreground:**  
- The road surface is asphalt with dark, wet patches. A double solid yellow line runs down the center. On the right side of the road (from the viewer’s perspective), white dashed lines mark lane divisions. A white solid line runs along the left curb, and a white solid line marks the road’s right edge. The driving side is left-hand traffic, as indicated by the road’s lane configuration.  
- **Left foreground:** A large rectangular gray metal container with rust stains on its side. It has a closed gray door with a small white sign (text not legible), positioned next to the left curb.  
- **Right foreground:** A white metal fence with curved top bars (vertical bars, material: metal) runs parallel to the road along the right edge. Adjacent to the fence, a reddish-brown paved sidewalk is visible.  

**Midground:**  
- **Left midground:** A wooden utility pole with a horizontal crossbar supports multiple horizontal wires (5–6 wires). The area to the left of the pole has dry, brown vegetation.  
- **Right midground:** A second wooden utility pole (similar to the left) with a horizontal crossbar and multiple wires. Further down the road, a street lamp with a cylindrical pole and a single lamp head is visible. The white metal fence continues along the right edge.  
- **Center background (road):** Several small, distant vehicles travel in the same direction as the viewer, positioned on the left side of the double yellow line (same direction as the viewer).  

**Background:**  
- **Left background (behind container):** Low-rise buildings with blue and brown roofs. A tall rectangular building (5–6 stories) with a light brown facade and multiple square windows is prominent. A white multi-story building (5–6 stories) is visible behind the brown building.  
- **Right background (beyond fence):** A series of low-rise buildings with green and red (or orange) roofs, uniformly arranged. These have light-colored facades and are positioned behind a white metal fence. Additional white fences are visible in front of these buildings.  
- **Distant background:** Hilly terrain with dense trees is visible beyond the buildings. The sky is overcast with gray clouds.  

**Note:** No visible text (e.g., road name signs, shop signs) is legible in the scene. No traffic lights, fire hydrants, or license plates are visible.

details.name: double solid yellow line
details.reason: Yellow center lines are a specific road marking that can help narrow down certain regions and driving rules.
details.focused_description: Two parallel solid yellow lines running along the center of the road. The lines are straight (in the visible section), made of paint, yellow in color, with no visible gaps or breaks. They are positioned on an asphalt surface.

details.name: wooden utility pole
details.reason: Wooden poles with horizontal crossbars are characteristic of infrastructure in many parts of the world.
details.focused_description: A tall, cylindrical wooden utility pole. It has a light brown color, showing signs of weathering. The pole supports multiple crossarms with attached electrical wires. No visible text is present on the pole. The material appears to be wood, and its condition includes typical weathering from outdoor exposure.

details.name: white metal fence
details.reason: The style and material of perimeter fencing can be a clue to specific urban or suburban environments.
details.focused_description: The white metal fence features vertical bars with decorative finial-like tops, a curved undulating top edge, and is painted white. It is constructed from metal, appears to be in good condition with no visible damage, and has no visible text or markings.

details.name: street lamp
details.reason: The design of street lighting poles can help identify specific regional infrastructure.
details.focused_description: The street lamp consists of a tall, cylindrical gray metal pole with a horizontal arm extending from it, supporting a long, narrow dark-colored light fixture. The pole has visible electrical wiring attached. No text is present on the street lamp.

details.name: blue and brown roofs
details.reason: The color and style of rooftops are often characteristic of certain architectural traditions or climates.
